Matthew R. Schultz, Esq., Howard, Rice, Nemerovski, 415-399-3146, for petitioner and moving party Morgan Stanley, Inc.

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. JONATHAN D. ROBBINS, ESQ., MORGAN STANLEY, (415) 693-6215, FOR PETITIONER AND MOVING PARTY MORGAN STANLEY DW, INC. AND MARK PATTERSON

No other appearances on this matter. Proof of Service was provided to the court. PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY DW, INC. AND MARK PATTERSON'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Pursuant To CCP 1285: DENIED for failure to comply with CCP 1290.4. (301/PHA) REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220.
